title: ANC - Transparency mode behavior during the call
scenario: Transparency Mode in Device Settings ANC tab is not greyed out and can be selected during a call on ANC-supported devices
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure an ANC-supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Make or receive a call using the connected device.
4. While on the call, go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC tab.
5. Observe the Transparency Mode option in the ANC tab.
6. Attempt to select/tap the Transparency Mode option.
expected: The Transparency Mode option should be greyed out and non-selectable. If the user taps it, a pop-up dialog should appear with the message "This settings cannot be adjusted while on a call" and an "Ok" button. Tapping "Ok" closes the dialog.
